opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected on site or GMB listing.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing emergencies in Boise go to competitors who offer instant booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI chat booking widget to capture drain and plumbing jobs 24/7 without staff.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and zero online contact options beyond phone.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call leaves no record, losing Boise leads permanently.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call logging and CRM capture to store every caller's job details automatically.

opportunities.label: Dormant Customer Reactivation
opportunities.signal: 412 reviews indicate large historical customer base with no email marketing tools detected.
opportunities.observation: Roto-Rooter Boise has a dormant customer pool generating zero repeat or referral revenue.
opportunities.fix: Use AI to segment past customers and send automated drain maintenance reactivation campaigns.
